column5:
Summary
First complete the minimal PVE requirement before going to this [Endgame Priority List].
column7: Fair ⭐ level, not ideal, not the worst either

column5: Helps in everything; PVP + PVE, can be slot into any team and makes it significantly better
Helps in everything; PVP + PVE, can be slot into any team and makes it significantly better
Helps in everything; PVP + PVE, can be slot into any team and makes it significantly better
Must have for both PVP & PVE [RO] - Bunch of actions and DMG boost

Top tier both PVP & PVE - A must have hero for everything
10-stars only for PVP, for everything else 9-stars is enough
A better Gaia starting at 8-stars, and a far better Gaia at 10-stars and above, especially with exclusive runes.
Top PVP hero - a must have for both WA & Foggy competition, key part of many teams for survival
Makes Ethereals deadly in PVP - close to unbeatable, her Oath Force isn't all that "justified" as it is for the others
Expected to be slighly better damage booster than Elisha at the high investment; should be top tier in both PVP & PVE.
Top PVP hero - a must have for both WA & Foggy competition, key part in Avenger - Phantoms and only really usable there.
The strongest Mystifier hero in the game right now, if you want your Mystifiers to have any odds of winning, you'll want her.
Often mandatory hero for the RO boss stages, other than that she's a key part of Mystifier's team in the PVP
After the recent hotfix on her Oath force, she's quite OP in Mystifiers.
Unique Oath Force; countering PI reliably and bringing +2 Glorians is insane value - only for PVP players. She doesn't bring a lot of value, if any, in PVE.
Strong Oath Force - Strong hero.
Oath Force is barely felt in her case after the loss of seasonal stats, only worth getting up to 9-stars for the +2 Dooms.

Solid in PVP and high-end PVE [Palace/LC/RO] - other than that, she's easily replaced by Ophelia in PVE, so this hero is mostly for low-spenders, for F2P's only ok to invest if already own her at 6-stars.
A perfect balance between PVP and PVE; filler hero that slots majority of the teams.
Oath Force is okay-ish hence why the 'Middle' tier - only worth taking if you're done with the majority of the heroes at above
Terrible Oath force; peaks at 9-stars due to her reflect skill, should stay at that until she's more viable in shops & selectors.
Worth investing if Venus is acquired, but not a "must-own"
Strong Oath force, strong hero - but a bit old, hard to justify spending Oracles on her when there's better heroes in the shop to work towards.
A mid hero due to her Oath force "not working" and poor synergy, only viable as a CC cleanser for burst-like teams.
Only worth investing once you enter the PVP competitive zone, completely useless in PVE and only serves as an Avenger filler hero that is often crucial for the battle win/loss
Only worth getting up to 10-stars for PVP; otherwise keep her at 9-stars.
Good Oath Force but the difference between 7 to 12-stars is really small, not justified the investment until she becomes "easier" to get.
Only really good with E. Diana & Pandora in PVP/PVE, not really a mandatory hero for anything, skippable, but good to have "just in case" at 9-stars for the future.
Outdated & replaced by Arc. Dorabella; still a good hero for 2nd Ethereals, unfortunately requires Legendary Exclusive Runes to be viable & skin for PVP.
Her Oath force doesn't justify the investment; long-term, you'll get her up to 12-stars with the free selectors from RO/events
Oath Force is bad - but okay now due to Venus, only justifiable going above 8-stars to 10-stars in a case with Venus.
Pretty terrible Oath Force, hard to justify spending any Oracle Coins for her, work with RO selectors
Outdated, only used in PVP as a filler and Tombs or PVE for more than 4-team content.
Solid in Protectors for providing CC + 3 Glorians [if EX'd] but not a good Oath Force
Only used in the Ethereals as a filler - not mandatory, hard to fit in other teams, also has terrible Oath Force
Hard to fit in any Avengers due to poor rune synergy, good hero done wrong, not worth summoning on
It's only usability is RO but even then is not a must, skip - on top of that her Oath Force is bad
Only usable on whale accounts and even then there's better options, skip unless you wanna be funny
